---
title: "Teaching"
description: I teach undergraduate and graduate courses on data analysis in R in the [Department of Engineering Management and Systems Engineering](http://emse.seas.gwu.edu/) at The George Washington University.
preview: images/lab/john_helveston.png
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Courses"
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

.
